title: External Risk & Event Intelligence (SCRI)
guardrails: Packets are advisory: SCRI review transitions, exposure matcher runs, Twin acknowledgements, mitigation acceptance, war-room approvals, and partner communications stay in governed SCRI/Twin workflows.
Queue review and approve actions write audit events and may enqueue AssistantActionQueueItem rows — they never mutate SCRI events, Twin rows, or mitigation statuses silently.

steps: Sign in with SCRI, reports, orders, Control Tower, or settings edit access.
Open /assistant/external-risk-event-intelligence and click Create Sprint 20 packet.
Confirm AssistantExternalRiskEventPacket persists with eventIntelligenceScore and dimensional JSON.
scenarios.passWhen: POST create_packet returns 201 and GET lists the packet without SCRI or Twin mutations.

steps: Queue external risk intelligence review with optional note.
scenarios.passWhen: Status REVIEW_QUEUED and audit answerKind sprint20_er_rev recorded.

steps: Approve packet after risk council sign-off.
Verify sprint20_er_ok audit narrative denies automatic SCRI/Twin changes.
scenarios.passWhen: Status APPROVED; SCRI events and Twin signals unchanged.
